title: Parse Key=Value Log Fields
description: Parse a structured log line in key=value format where values may be optionally quoted with double quotes. Return a dictionary of all key-value pairs found. Quoted values should have their surrounding quotes removed in the result.
constraints: Values may be optionally wrapped in double quotes
Return an empty dict for empty or whitespace-only input

examples.explanation: Four key-value pairs are parsed. The msg value was quoted and contains a space; the quotes are stripped from the result.

test_cases.description: Line with mixed quoted and unquoted values
All values are quoted with spaces
